global_description: A medium-sized songbird with a slender, elongated body and a slightly curved beak. It has a predominantly black plumage with a rusty or brownish tinge, especially on the head and upperparts. The bird features a glossy sheen on its feathers, giving it a metallic appearance.

part_details.head: Rusty brownish coloration, slightly rounded with a glossy sheen.
part_details.beak: Slightly curved, slender, and pointed, dark in color.
part_details.plumage: Predominantly black with a metallic sheen, rusty tinge on upperparts.
part_details.wings: Glossy black with hints of brown, medium length.
part_details.tail: Long, narrow, and black with a slight sheen.

spatial_relations: The rusty head transitions into glossy black plumage on the body.
The slightly curved beak protrudes from the front of the head.
The wings extend laterally from the body, showing a metallic sheen.
